---
title: "Species Richness Workflow Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source(file.path("..", "R", "helpers.R"))
project_root <- find_project_root()
config <- load_project_config(project_root)
```

# Overview

This report captures the analysis currently implemented for species-richness prediction maps across spatial scales.
All code below is based on the existing reporting analysis script and kept consistent with the current workflow.

# Load required libraries

```{r libraries}
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(spdep)
```

# Load prediction rasters

```{r load-rasters}
richness_scale1 <- rast(file.path(config$paths$prediction_maps, "predictions_Q.tif"))
richness_scale2 <- rast(file.path(config$paths$prediction_maps, "predictions_1m.tif"))
richness_scale3 <- rast(file.path(config$paths$prediction_maps, "predictions_100m_mean.tif"))
richness_scale4 <- rast(file.path(config$paths$prediction_maps, "predictions_100m_total.tif"))

crs(richness_scale1) <- "EPSG:28992"
crs(richness_scale2) <- "EPSG:28992"
crs(richness_scale3) <- "EPSG:28992"
crs(richness_scale4) <- "EPSG:28992"

print(ext(richness_scale1))
print(ext(richness_scale2))
print(ext(richness_scale3))
print(ext(richness_scale4))
```

# Continue full reporting analysis

```{r run-reporting-script}
source(file.path(config$project_root, "analysis", "06. Analyze prediction maps", "Analyse Prediction Patterns.R"))
```
